one_time_description: Debt forgiveness of $26,200 (membership payable written off); flood claim settlement occurred subsequent to year-end (July 18, 2022) resulting in repayment of ISC flooding claim loan ($1,884,370) and BMO term loan ($1,015,000)
economic_notes: Nation receives 47% of revenue from ISC. Investment in Niiwin Wendaanimok Limited Partnership ($75,000 total). Investment in Kakina Economic Development Group LP. Gas station under construction with carrying value of $310,265. Community Centre under construction financed by $2,500,000 line of credit. Flood claim settled subsequent to year-end with federal and provincial governments.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Nation located in Ontario. Flood claim settled subsequent to year-end (July 18, 2022); ISC flooding claim loan ($1,884,370) and BMO term loan ($1,015,000) both repaid from settlement proceeds - these are classified as long-term debt and term loans due on demand respectively on the balance sheet. Nation not in compliance with First Nation Financial Transparency Act posting deadline. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Capital segment includes expenses of $404,717. Economic Development segment expenses $223,618. Current liabilities calculated as line of credit $1,858,533 + accounts payable $1,626,708 + funding repayable $92,589 + term loans due on demand $1,015,000 = $4,592,830. OSR calculated as total revenue $9,710,257 minus total government transfers $8,657,151 = $1,053,106.
